name: Peas and Carrots with Mint
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the carrots in a saucepan with enough water to cover; bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat and cook, uncovered, for 4 minutes or until crisp-tender.
3. Drain the carrots.
4. Add the remaining ingredients to the saucepan.
5. Cook and stir for 3-4 minutes or until the peas are crisp-tender.
